items.title: UK eases sanctions on Russian jet fuel and diesel imports
items.desc: The U.K. government said Wednesday that it had eased sanctions on imports of Russian jet fuel and diesel refined in third countries on Wednesday, amid spiralling fuel prices caused by the Middle East war.
